author: @marodriguezbabilonia
text: Nice balance between animation and the Avatar android appereance. In another note, you mention "modern AIs"... it would be very informative to see a video comparing the very first AI models with the latest ones in a simple narrative.

author: @goldenpacificmedia
text: A very interesting video on innovation in the AI space.  Thanks for calling this research to our attention.

author: @CryptiCryptoAIM
text: 99% of tokens that model uses is used for simple tasks, in which you will not seee a difference between a 10b or 1t sys. Its the hard tokens that matter (like core coding tokens or math solutions). Just because their not doing much, doesnt mean the work is unimportant

author: @YSKWatch
text: the magnitude is only around 150 thousand, while the data itself is billions parameter. 150 thousand is just benchmarking. everyone doing that and to all data models, not just to claude.
